title: Policy: Policies Applied - Restart the app
scenario: Admin portal device policies remain enforced and locked after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and confirm the device is connected.
3. Apply a set of device policies (e.g., disable ANC, lock Equalizer, restrict Transparency Mode) via the admin portal.
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and verify the policies are enforced (e.g., ANC toggle is grayed out, Equalizer is locked).
5. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
6. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that the previously applied policies remain enforced and locked.
8. While the app is closed, modify the existing device policies via the admin portal (e.g., enable ANC, unlock Equalizer).
9. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
10. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that the updated policies are now properly applied.
expected: Device policies applied via the admin portal are enforced and remain locked after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app. Changes made to the policy while the app is closed are properly applied when the app is relaunched.
